Corvisquire

#0821 Rookidee #0823 Corviknight
  • Contents
  • Info
  • Base stats
  • Evolution chart
  • Pokédex entries
  • Moves learned
  • Sprites
  • Locations
  • Language

Corvisquire is a Flying type Pokémon introduced in Generation 8.

The lessons of many harsh battles have taught it how to accurately judge an opponent's strength.

Evolution of Rookidee; evolves into Corviknight.

Corvisquire

Pokédex data

National № 0822
Type Flying
Species Raven Pokémon
Height 0.8 m (2′07″)
Weight 16.0 kg (35.3 lbs)
Abilities 1. Keen Eye
2. Unnerve
Big Pecks (hidden ability)
Local № 0022 (Sword/Shield)
0041 (Scarlet/Violet)
0164 (The Crown Tundra)
0074 (Mega Dimension)

Training

EV yield 2 Speed
Catch rate 120 (15.7% with PokéBall, full HP)
Base Friendship 50 (normal)
Base Exp. 128
Growth Rate Medium Slow

Breeding

Egg Groups Flying
Gender 50% male, 50% female
Egg cycles 15 (3,599–3,855 steps)

The ranges shown on the right are for a level 100 Pokémon. Maximum values are based on a beneficial nature, 252 EVs, 31 IVs; minimum values are based on a hindering nature, 0 EVs, 0 IVs.

Evolution chart

#0821
Rookidee
Flying
(Level 18)
#0822
Corvisquire
Flying
(Level 38)
#0823
Corviknight
Flying · Steel

Pokédex entries

Sword Smart enough to use tools in battle, these Pokémon have been seen picking up rocks and flinging them or using ropes to wrap up enemies.
Shield The lessons of many harsh battles have taught it how to accurately judge an opponent’s strength.
Scarlet It’s said that the reason behind Corvisquire’s high level of intelligence is the large size of its brain relative to those of other bird Pokémon.
Violet This intelligent Pokémon will quickly learn how to use any tool it can hold in its beak or its talons.

Name origin

corvine
of or relating to crows
squire
young nobleman
